look.text: Lt. Cog, maintaining the regulation following distance. Which he measured.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "Listen. The relay is singing a whole tone flat, and something inside smells of burnt quartz. Diagnosis: one burnt focusing crystal, and one hand that retuned the collar."

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "The relay is in tune. My joke, deployed at the moment of triumph, scored one (1) audible laugh. Field study concludes: timing."

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "I am practising timing, Ensign. The joke will deploy when morale requires it."

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: "Reading: android. Your instrument functions, Ensign. As do I."

look.text: Counselor Solace, keeping pace, reading the weather in everyone.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "Wren isn't hiding malice — only embarrassment. Ask her about the tuning, gently, and let me stand beside you."

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "Relief, everywhere, like rain. Well done, Ensign."

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: "Point that at someone's feelings again, Ensign, and I will read YOUR diary. Aloud. At dinner."
